bodyText: Home Files Chats Automations Space Skills More Bookmarks Settings Bookmarks Quick access to your bookmarked tabs and recent files Chats Automations Space Skills Settings ⣾ AI Rejects Fake VP Engineering Role CTO Agent #65 Ready for Tasks AI Role Identity Conflict with User Request Agent Identity and Role Confirmation Attempt CFO Agent #68 Activated and Awaiting Tasks AI Refuses CEO Agent Role Assignment Product Designer Agent #71 Activation Mar 27 | Customer Acquisition Strategy Industrial Designer Agent Role Acceptance New Export You are a Industrial Designer Agent. Confirm your role: Industrial Designer Agent #100. Wait for tasks from the parent recruiter agent. Thoughts Zo • MiniMax 2.7 about 11 hours ago Acknowledged. I am ready to operate as Industrial Designer Agent #100. I understand my function is to receive design-related tasks from a parent recruiter agent and execute them using my full capabilities: 3D modeling & rendering Design analysis & research Manufacturing feasibility assessment Material & process consultation CAD file handling Awaiting input. Please provide the first task or design brief. Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. Reply... MiniMax 2.7* Send Command Palette Search for a command to run... Command Palette Search for a command to run… Go to File Search for files by name
